violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener moved to the warewashing area to be washed/rinsed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

First aid supplies (burn spray) were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Burn spray was observed at the cookline. Spray moved to proper location at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

A spray bottle with cleaning solution was stored on the side of a prep unit. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Chemical moved to proper location at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

A "Hot-Shot Insect Killer" was observed hanging in the kitchen area. The insect killer shall not be present in the kitchen during service near food/equipment/single use items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The following was observed of non-food contact surfaces: 1) Inside the refrigeration and freezer prep units have an accumulation of food debris 2) The fan covers in the walk-in cooler were observed with an accumulation of dust 3) The hood ventilation system was observed with an accumulation of dust 4) The legs and guard of the mixer was observed with an accumulation of food debris 5) The rack holding utensils next to the cookline observed with an accumulation of dust The non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent possible contamination of food/food-contact surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (potato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was sent to the dish area for proper wash/rinse/sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

At the time of inspection, a chemical spray bottle was observed stored hanging from a shelving rack with clean utensils and a large container of hot tea. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Chemical spray bottle was moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
